title: TODO: short title
description: The primary network interface eth0 is flapping — going up and down repeatedly — with an unstable carrier signal. Services are experiencing intermittent connectivity loss. The NIC state must be corrected to up with a stable carrier, and the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/nic.state to see the interface state
hint_3: Fix the carrier by checking the cable and driver, then restore eth0=up and carrier=stable
